blockingIssues.description: src/curve.ts now depends on unguarded getTokenDecimals + parseUnits in findCurveQuote; if decimals lookup fails, Curve quote generation can fail entirely, so Curve wei fields are not reliably available.
At the 375px breakpoint in src/server.ts, slippage typography is reduced to 0.6875rem for slippage controls, violating VAL-CSS-001 (>= 0.75rem).
At the 375px breakpoint in src/server.ts, .slippage-preset-compact min-width is 40px, violating VAL-CSS-005 (>= 44px touch target).

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.docker_validate_compose = 'docker compose config' so compose-file validation is available in the shared command catalog alongside stack validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update fullstack-worker restart guidance to avoid execution patterns that the safety layer blocks (e.g., chained lsof/xargs kill + background start); provide a safe, non-blocked restart sequence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: persist-user-choices review observed the documented restart command fail with safety rejection before fallback.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require full, untruncated validator runs in fullstack-worker (explicitly forbid piping tests through head/tail) and require reporting complete command exit results.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docker-service-rename review found test execution piped through head while handoff still marked procedure followed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen fullstack-worker procedure enforcement for tests-first: require explicit failing/added test evidence before implementation edits for feature behavior changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wei-and-address-display review found implementation edits landed before feature-specific test assertions, with only a later mock addition.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For UI contract checks with numeric thresholds, require explicit checklist verification at the smallest required viewport before concluding pass.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: css-polish-responsive review observed recorded 11px font and 40px preset width at 375px despite pass claim.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit feature-isolation guidance: workers must keep scoped diffs per feature and finalize with a concrete commit ID (no pending) before ending feature runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both css-polish-responsive and wei-and-address-display reviews found scope bleed/traceability issues across commits and pending commit metadata.

rejectedObservations.observation: Commit hygiene concern from css-polish-responsive review
